zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm於1335年出生在蘇格蘭貝維其可爾帕克斯頓時，他的父親Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm33歲，母親Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood25歲。他和Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。他於1327年在英國蘇格蘭被列為"magnate of scotland"。他去世於1393年8月30日之後在蘇格蘭艾爾金爾埃爾金。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm于1335年出生在苏格兰貝維其可爾帕克斯頓时，他的父亲Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm33岁，母亲Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood25岁。他和Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。他于1327年在英国苏格兰被列为"magnate of scotland"。他去世于1393年8月30日之后在苏格兰艾爾金爾埃爾金。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chisholm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Chisholme near Hawick in southern Scotland, which derives its name from Old English c̄se, cēse ‘cheese’ (from Latin caseus) + holm ‘piece of dry land in a fen’ and refers to a waterside meadow good for dairy farming and hence for producing cheeses. In the 14th century members of this family migrated to the Highlands, settling in Strathglass, where their name was Gaelicized as Siosal.

variants.name: Chisom
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  , once common in Yorkshire but now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chisam
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  , once common in Cumbria but now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chisum
meanings: Scottish: shortened form of   Chisholm  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chislom
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Chisholm   or   Chisolm  .

variants.name: Chezem
meanings: Altered form of Scottish   Chisholm  . Compare   Chisum  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm was born in 1335, in Paxton, Berwickshire, Scotland, his father, Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm, was 33 and his mother, Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick. In 1327, his occupation is listed as "magnate of scotland" in Scotland, United Kingdom. He died after 30 August 1393, in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm est né en 1335, à Paxton, Berwickshire, Écosse, son père, Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick. En 1327, sa profession de son indiquée est "magnate of scotland" à Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé après 30 août 1393, à Elgin, Elginshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm 1335 in Paxton, Berwickshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm 33 und seine Mutter Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood 25. Er hatte mit Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1327 ist sein Beruf als "magnate of scotland" in Schottland, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb nach 30. August 1393 in Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm è nato il nel 1335 nel Paxton, Berwickshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick. Nel 1327, la sua occupazione è indicata come "magnate of scotland" nel Scozia, Regno Unito. Morì dopo il 30 agosto 1393, nel Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholmが1335年にスコットランドバーウィクシュアイアプアクストンで生まれた時，父Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholmは33歳，母Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwoodは25歳であった。彼はMargaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwickとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1327年，イギリススコットランドでの職業は"magnate of scotland"と記録されている。彼は1393年8月30日以後にスコットランドエルジンシュアイアエルジンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm(이)가 1335년 스컷랜드 버윅실르 파스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1327년, 그의 직업은 영국 스코틀랜드에서 "magnate of scotland"이었다. 그는 1393년 8월 30일 이후 스컷랜드 엘긴실르 엘긴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm nasceu em 1335, em Paxton, Berwickshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick. Em 1327, sua profissão aparece como "magnate of scotland" em Escócia, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu após 30 de agosto de 1393, em Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm родился в 1335 г. в местности пакстон, бирвиккшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick. В 1327 году он работал по профессии "magnate of scotland" в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Он умер после 30 августа 1393 г. в местности элгин, элгиншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert de Chisholm 6th of Chisholm nació en 1335, en Paxton, Berwickshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert de Chisholm 5th of Chisholm, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Anne-nic-Robert Lauder of Ouarrelwood, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con Margaret Haliburton of Haliburton of that Ilk, County of Berwick. En 1327, su ocupación registrada era "magnate of scotland" en Escocia, Reino Unido. Murió después de 30 de agosto de 1393, en Elgin, Elginshire, Scotland.
